full_text:
Ma Qi (Chengbo) 馬齊 (承伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Qi (馬齊), styledChengbo (承伯), was born in Liangzhong in Baxi. Became a Minister of Writing, known for his ability. Ma Qi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
